title: STN's Legendary Survival
description: A really great modpack to play! Created by STN Studio!
body:
# STEAM ENGINE STUDIOS' LEGENDARY SURVIVAL

**STN's Legendary Survival** is a great modpack to play for Forge 1.19.2!
Here's a list of some mods: Create, End Remastered, Deeper And Darker, and even more!
Currently with 177 mods!

Created by: Steam Engine Studios

**[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBKkQWnUgHlyi1llywNsvKQ)**
